children.value: bublee is a loose, playful place to think. Every idea is a bubble drifting on water — there's no grid and no rules, just bubbles you push around and connect however you like.
✋ Drag a bubble to fling it — it keeps a little momentum and the others gently make room.
🫧 Long-press the open water to blow a new bubble where you pressed.
👆 Tap a bubble to rename the idea.
⬇️ Drop one bubble dead-centre on another to NEST it — housing a smaller idea inside a bigger one (the parent grows a bright rim and the child orbits inside).
↔️ Overlap two bubbles edge-to-edge instead and they LINK — a flowing arrow shows the idea travelling from one to the next (origin → destination). Overlap them again to unlink.
To pull a nested bubble back out, just drag it away — grabbing a bubble always frees it, and where you drop it decides its new home.
Everything saves and syncs like your other apps. Coming later: tunable feel (drift, bounciness, nest grip) and colour-by-theme.
